chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 1524 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 26. 2. For order on CMA No. 3789/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.10.2025 Mr. Irfan Mir Holepota, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, the questions framed for determination already stands decided against the department by virtue of judgment reported as 2023 PTD 1709. In view hereof, he states that reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
